name: Arachne
description: 🕷️ Universal web intelligence platform — scraping, browser automation, vision, transcription, RAG. 9 MCP tools in one server.

tools.name: arachne_search
tools.description: Search the web via DuckDuckGo (~0.8s). Factual questions, news, finding URLs.

tools.name: arachne_scrape
tools.description: Extract URL content as clean markdown via Crawl4AI (~1.5-4s).

tools.name: arachne_extract
tools.description: Universal extractor — auto-detects web/audio/video/image/document format (~0ms cache, ~2-10s).

tools.name: arachne_browser_extract
tools.description: Extract via real Playwright browser with 4-layer anti-bot evasion (~4-12s). For Cloudflare/CAPTCHA sites.

tools.name: arachne_browser_run
tools.description: Execute browser actions (click, type, login, screenshot) (~3-20s).

tools.name: arachne_query
tools.description: Query your RAG knowledge base with semantic search (~1-3s).

tools.name: arachne_vision
tools.description: Image analysis: OCR, colors, faces, quality, metadata (~1-8s).
